query:
-- Add missing columns
ALTER TABLE proposals
  ADD COLUMN `departments` json DEFAULT (JSON_ARRAY()),
  ADD COLUMN `isAnonymous` boolean DEFAULT false,
  ADD COLUMN `managerId` int,
  ADD COLUMN `managerDecision` text,
  ADD COLUMN `committeeDecision` text,
  ADD COLUMN `votesCount` int DEFAULT 0;

-- Copy data from old columns
UPDATE proposals SET 
  `managerDecision` = `managerNotes`,
  `committeeDecision` = `committeeNotes`,
  `votesCount` = `voteCount`;

-- Fix status enum to match schema
ALTER TABLE proposals MODIFY COLUMN `status` enum('deschisa','in_evaluare','acceptata','amanata','respinsa') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'deschisa';

-- Fix referenceNumber
ALTER TABLE proposals MODIFY COLUMN `referenceNumber` varchar(32) NOT NULL;

-- Drop old columns
ALTER TABLE proposals
  DROP COLUMN `category`,
  DROP COLUMN `managerApproval`,
  DROP COLUMN `committeeApproval`,
  DROP COLUMN `managerNotes`,
  DROP COLUMN `committeeNotes`,
  DROP COLUMN `voteCount`;

-- Fix referenceNumber
